summary: Raw Material Add Stock with Bank Account Bug Fix - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend API correctly creates journal entries with RM- prefix when bank account is selected, reduces bank balance, and includes raw material purchases in manufacturing filter. Frontend Add Stock dialog displays all required fields: quantity, unit cost price, total cost (auto-calculates), bank account selector dropdown, and reference field.

add_stock_dialog_bank_selector.details: Add Stock dialog shows 'Pay From Account' dropdown with bank accounts and current balances

add_stock_dialog_unit_cost_price.details: Unit Cost Price field shown, pre-populated with material's cost price

add_stock_dialog_total_cost.details: Total Cost field shown, auto-calculates when quantity or unit price changes

add_stock_total_cost_auto_calculation.details: Total Cost = Quantity x Unit Cost Price. Verified: 10 x 100 = 1000.00

add_stock_with_bank_creates_journal_entr.details: Adding stock WITH bank account creates journal entry with RM- prefix (RM-RM0003-2ed71e)

add_stock_with_bank_reduces_balance.details: Bank account balance reduced from 29899.87 to 29649.87 (reduced by 250)

add_stock_without_bank_works.details: Adding stock WITHOUT bank account works normally, journal_entry_created: false

rm_purchase_in_quick_transactions.details: Raw material purchase appears in Quick Transactions with 'RM Purchase' label

manufacturing_filter_includes_rm_purchas.details: Manufacturing filter includes raw_material_purchase type along with mfg_* types. 13 total manufacturing transactions found.

GET /api/bank-accounts.details: Returns bank accounts with current_balance field

seed_data_creation: None - used existing raw materials (Buttons RM0003, Cotton RM0001, treads RM0004, zipper RM0002) and bank account (Cash In Hand)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Raw material add stock with bank account integration fully working. Journal entries created with RM- prefix appear in Quick Transactions under 'RM Purchase' label. Manufacturing filter correctly includes raw_material_purchase transactions. Bank balance is correctly reduced when adding stock with bank account selected.
